active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

superseded_sections: Dirty active-control-file provenance is bounded by work/phase-1/control_workspace_quarantine.md after GOD_ADJUST.

real_path_wired_basis: Phase 1 did not change runtime behavior; it produced contracts tied to the existing v3/public benchmark path and Phase 0 case-level diagnostics.
failing_tests_not_applicable_reason: Phase 1 is contract-only and made no production behavior change; future implementation phases must start from RED tests or concrete failing benchmark cases.
